result.reasoning: The question asks whether locomotive93 will arrive before the hot air balloon show ends if it travels at top speed. From the tool call history: Step 2 shows locomotive93 is assigned to "Sunset Picnic Trip." Step 4 maps this excursion to a distance of 50 miles. Step 3 provides the top speed of the EMD NW2 locomotive as 55-65 mph. Using the conservative lower bound of 55 mph, Step 5 calculates travel time as 50 miles / 55 mph ≈ 0.909 hours ≈ 55 minutes. The show ends in 1.5 hours (90 minutes). Since 55 minutes < 90 minutes, the locomotive arrives before the show ends. The final output must be "Yes" or "No" with initial capital. The answer is affirmative, so output "Yes". Applied casing rule: sentence-case capitalised first word.
